summary: Created MPI-163 (HIGH/blocking) — engine-aware dependency resolution. The MPI-157 split is HALF-WIRED: engine tag filters DOWNLOAD but NOT the status gate (isModelUsable/isOperationInstalled walk resolveFullUniverse = ALL deps incl bf16). Fresh GGUF-only Pod volume -> bf16 legitimately absent -> gate fails -> no prompt box (worked on old volume only because it had BOTH transformers). FIX (user design): per-model dependencies+localDeps+remoteDeps, drop per-dep engine tag, engine-param on resolveDeps so every consumer derives the engine-correct set. Also moves GGUF node to remoteDeps (currently installs locally for nothing) + replaces ggufWhenRemote bool. CURRENT STATE BROKEN on fresh Pod until this lands.
